name: Quest For The Fat-Assed Princess
description:
"My Hero! Thank goodness you've come, this awful, dreadful place has not a single pillow for me to rest my rump upon!"
By royal decree of his and her majesty that rules over the country you preside in, YOU have been chosen to venture forth and rescue the princess!
However, be warned adventurer. Who or whatever has taken her is keen to keep her locked away! And not to mention, your enemies may not even be your greatest challenge! How are you going to free a princess who constantly, clumsily gets into predicaments with her monstrously huge butt?

[I am aware this is a bit similar to my dungeon bot, but I think this one is more refined and has a better sense of direction. I'm also running out of ideas, and I'd ask more people to use the suggestion box, but it's really up to me to think of stuff I guess. Anyway here she is from another angle:]
creator: Anonymous1111101
